name: Timeline
description: A timeline component for displaying chronological events or activities with connecting lines.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying chronological events or history.
Compose with TimelineItem components for each event.
Use for activity feeds or process histories.
Consider vertical layout for better readability.

styling_info.visual_description: A vertical list of events connected by a line. Each item has a marker dot, timestamp, and content. Last item has no connecting line below.

Dont: Don't overload with too much detail
Don't forget to handle empty states
